common.og_image_alt: Privacy-first media conversion suite with local processing

home.title: Media Converter | Next-Gen Suite with Local Processing
home.description: High-precision conversion for images, videos, audio, and PDF. Privacy-first, with all processing in the browser. No uploads required.

image.title: Image Converter | Batch Resize & HEIC Support - Media Converter
image.description: Secure image conversion tool. Change HEIC to JPG, support WebP, and batch resize. Photos are processed strictly on your device.

video.title: Video Converter & Compressor | High Quality & FFmpeg - Media Converter
video.description: Fast video conversion in-browser. Supports MP4, WebM, MOV. Optimized presets for YouTube/TikTok and audio extraction (MP3).

audio.title: Audio Converter | High Fidelity, FLAC & AAC - Media Converter
audio.description: Converter for audiophiles. Supports WAV, MP3, FLAC, AAC. High bitrate settings and lossless conversion, all in-browser.

pdf.title: PDF to Word | Maintain Layout & High Accuracy - Media Converter
pdf.description: Accurate PDF to Word (.docx) conversion in-browser. Extract text and images without losing layout. Secure for business documents.

compress_image.title: Image Compressor | Reduce File Size & Maintain Quality - Media Converter
compress_image.description: In-browser image compression tool. Dramatically reduce file sizes for PNG, JPG, and WebP. Achieve lightweight images while keeping them beautiful.

compress_video.title: Video Compressor | Shrink MP4 & WebM with High Speed - Media Converter
compress_video.description: Powerfully compress video files in your browser. Minimize file sizes without losing quality. Create lightweight videos perfect for social media or email in seconds.

compress_audio.title: Audio Compressor | Optimize MP3 & WAV Bitrate - Media Converter
compress_audio.description: Smartly reduce audio file sizes. Cut down data volume significantly via bitrate adjustment and mono conversion. Ideal for sharing podcasts or voice memos.

compress_pdf.title: PDF Compressor | Lightweight PDF via Image Optimization - Media Converter
compress_pdf.description: Significantly reduce PDF file sizes by re-compressing internal images. Generate lightweight, easy-to-send PDFs while maintaining layout. Secure local processing.

home.hero_description: Media Converter uses WebAssembly for complete local processing. Photos are personal. Videos are assets. We never send them to a server.
home.main_description: Everything processed directly in your browser. A new conversion experience without servers.
home.security_description: Our conversion engine runs directly in your browser via JavaScript and WebAssembly. No internet connection or upload required during conversion.

image.title: Image Converter
image.description: HEIC to JPG, WebP support, batch resize. Protect privacy by stripping location data (Exif).

video.title: Video Converter
video.description: MP4/MOV conversion. Pro presets for iPhone and TikTok for easy, high-quality exporting.

audio.title: Audio Converter
audio.description: MP3/WAV/FLAC conversion. Adjust bitrate (up to 320kbps) and sampling rates with ease.

pdf.title: PDF to Word
pdf.description: Convert PDF to editable Word. Maintain business document layouts securely and fast.

image_page.title: Image Converter (HEIC/WebP Support)
image_page.description: Convert to PNG, JPG, WebP and batch resize. Convert iPhone HEIC format instantly in your browser.
image_page.secure_desc: Photos are private. With our tool, files are never sent to a server; conversion is completed entirely within your browser. Safe for sensitive or private images.
image_page.exif_desc: Peace of mind when you want to remove location data before posting to SNS. Control metadata during conversion to protect privacy.
image_page.info_title: Fastest HEIC to JPG & WebP Conversion
image_page.iphone_desc: HEIC format used by modern iPhones often can't be read on PCs or older devices. Our tool lets you batch convert HEIC to JPG or PNG in seconds.
image_page.pro_desc: Supports conversion to WebP, essential for improving website speed. Combined with batch resizing, it dramatically boosts efficiency for bloggers and directors.

video_page.title: Video Converter & High-Speed Compression
video_page.description: Convert to MP4, WebM and optimize with device-specific presets. Process directly in your browser, no multi-GB uploads needed.
video_page.preset_desc: Automatically choose the best resolution and bitrate for iPhone, YouTube, TikTok, and more. Create high-quality videos without technical expertise.
video_page.audio_desc: High-quality audio track extraction. Perfect for podcasts or music production material. Convert to MP3 with a single click.
video_page.zap_desc: Video conversion takes time. Our converter uses FFmpeg.wasm for parallel processing and shows real-time progress. Since it runs in the browser, you don't have to worry about network drops.
video_page.mov_desc: Quickly convert MOV shot on smartphones to highly compatible MP4. Prevent editing software import issues before they happen.
video_page.privacy_desc: Convert confidential business videos on your own PC without using external servers, ensuring zero risk of data leaks.

audio.security_notice: Processed securely in your browser. No external uploads.

audio_page.title: Audio Converter (Pro Settings)
audio_page.description: Advanced conversion to MP3, WAV, AAC, OGG. High-res audio and fixed bitrate controls, all in-browser.
audio_page.spec_desc: Specify professional values like **320kbps** and **48kHz** directly. Guaranteed quality for audiophiles and streamers.
audio_page.lossless_desc: Zero-quality-loss conversion for FLAC and WAV. Batch convert entire albums quickly while maintaining fidelity.
audio_page.batch_desc: Drag and drop multiple audio files at once. Skip individual settings and finish work with a single ZIP download.
audio_page.wav_desc: Uses the latest encoding algorithms. MP3 compression from WAV keeps artifacts to a minimum for clear tone.
audio_page.limit_desc: No file size or frequency limits. Maximize browser resources for smooth local processing.

pdf_page.title: PDF Converter (High-Accuracy Word)
pdf_page.description: Convert PDF to Word (.docx), extract text and images. Maintain layout while creating editable documents.
pdf_page.layout_desc: The most common complaint with PDF-to-Word is layout breakage. Our tool uses a unique analysis engine to maintain structure, font, and placement accuracy.
pdf_page.secure_desc: Keep contracts and proposals off external servers. Process entirely in-browser for the highest level of information security.
pdf_page.word_desc: Convert PDF to editable Word. Re-use existing documents instantly and boost productivity for professionals and students.
pdf_page.extract_desc: Extract only images or text from your PDFs. Powerful support for gathering materials and creating presentations.

pdf.processing_desc: Large documents or high-quality images may take longer to process.
